title: Exclude subitems column from automation recipe
excerpt:
Hello, 
I made an integration recipe that triggers on status column changes 
  
Is there any way to exclude subitems from the recipe ? 
 
Thank you in advanced.

posts.author: togar (Togar Chikoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I made an integration recipe that triggers on status column changes

image759×302 3.84 KB

Is there any way to exclude subitems from the recipe ?

Thank you in advanced.

posts.author: togar (Togar Chikoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Matias.Monday ,

I made a custom trigger

image882×731 25.3 KB

But I don’t get any webhook data from monday after i change the status column value

Did I do something wrong ?

It seems, in order for me to exclude subitem columns, i will need a custom trigger that triggers from monday’s side whenever a status column value changed

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @togar!

My apologies. the workaround I sent implied the use of a webhook which I now realize would not have solved the need you have since it also supports subitems.

My bad!

There is no way of implementing this out of the box. I will try to come up with some workaround that fits your needs and come back to you if I find any

Again sorry for the confusion.

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: togar (Togar Chikoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Matias.Monday ,

No worries, have you figured out a way to solve this ?

Best regards,
Togar

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! At the moment this isn’t possible — I’d recommend sending an error message when the integration runs, advising them to not select a subitem column.
